title: Huawei Seeds for the Future Global Winner - Team Ireland
subtitle: Huawei Seeds for the Future
description: Huawei announced the winners of the second Tech4Good Competition on January 5, with the Irish team winning the first prize for their solution "Roll On" that helps wheelchair users independently board trains. This year's competition attracted 3,222 students from across 110 countries, who worked on more than 300 projects.

title: Individual Contribution to Society Life  - Media Production Society
subtitle: DCU Clubs & Societies
description: This award reflects my hard work and dedication to society life in DCU over the years in Redbrick as Chairperson and Secretary, Media Production and Fotosoc as Webmaster.

title: Outstanding Contribution to Student Life as a Class Representative
subtitle: DCU Student Life
description: Won the "Outstanding Contribution to Student Life as a Class Representative" award at the Student Impact Awards 2026 for my work not only as a class rep, but for my involvement with societies also.
